rss.channel:
Thiccctionary, Industrial https://thiccctionary.com/archive.html?tag=industrial
Thiccctionary entries tagged "industrial". en-us <<<<<<< HEAD Sat, 30 May 2026 00:43:01 GMT ======= Fri, 29 May 2026 20:43:10 GMT >>>>>>> origin/daily/2026-05-29
Anvil, Blacksmith https://thiccctionary.com/entries/2026-05-23.html https://thiccctionary.com/entries/2026-05-23.html Sat, 23 May 2026 12:00:00 GMT A dense, industrial-grade tool upon which metal is worked, characterized by its substantial mass and steadfast refusal to budge without considerable effort. Frequently sighted with a patina of history and dust, typically under raking light.
blacksmithtoolindustrial
Concrete Mixer https://thiccctionary.com/entries/2026-04-27.html https://thiccctionary.com/entries/2026-04-27.html Mon, 27 Apr 2026 12:00:00 GMT An industrial vehicle of contemplative rotundity, characterized by a single, slowly-rotating, drum-shaped midsection.
vehicleindustrialconstruction
Reel, Cable Industrial https://thiccctionary.com/entries/2026-04-22.html https://thiccctionary.com/entries/2026-04-22.html Wed, 22 Apr 2026 12:00:00 GMT A large, cylindrical apparatus used for spooling extensive lengths of cable, notable for its substantial diameter and pronounced bulk when loaded to capacity.
cableindustrialthiccc
Pipe, Industrial Stack https://thiccctionary.com/entries/2026-04-19.html https://thiccctionary.com/entries/2026-04-19.html Sun, 19 Apr 2026 12:00:00 GMT A towering cylinder of engineered steel, designed for the expulsion of industrial emissions at a formidable height, often characterized by its unapologetic girth when viewed from any direction.
industrialinfrastructuregirth
